items.title: Hotel that refused to give tourist tap water acted lawfully, Italian court rules
items.summary: The Italian Supreme Court rejected a tourist's claim that her consumer rights were breached when she was only offered €7 bottled mineral water.

items.title: 70% Drop in Levels of Forever Chemicals Observed in Seabird Eggs Tracks Regulatory Success
items.summary: Content of several “forever chemicals” in seabird eggs were found to have sharply decreased over the last 55 years by a team of scientists. While first rising exponentially from during the 1960s, the…
